positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric illustration of a cosmic forest at twilight. The central element is a towering, stylized binary tree with glowing crystalline sap and intricate bioluminescent roots reaching into stylized nebulae-filled ground. The surrounding elements include abstract, repeating constellations forming geometric panels, celestial jellyfish floating through the deep space foliage, and moons rendered as perfectly smooth, polished geometric discs. The color palette should be deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and touches of metallic gold, utilizing strong, contrasting silhouettes and clean lines. Ideal composition for a central apparel repeat pattern. High contrast, clean vector aesthetic, perfect symmetry, trending on ArtStation, highly detailed, smooth digital artwork.
